steps.expected: JSON output with matches array containing objects with file, line, text fields
steps.observed: JSON with total_matches=1, matches array of length 1, each object has file, line, text fields. routing_backend=CpuBackend, routing_reason=cpu-native.

steps.action: Validate matches count equals total_matches (CPU search)

steps.expected: JSON output with matches array for AST search
steps.observed: JSON with total_matches=15000, matches array of length 15000, each object has file, line, text fields. routing_backend=AstBackend, routing_reason=ast-native.

steps.action: Validate matches count equals total_matches (AST search)

assertions.title: Rewrite plan JSON includes routing fields

steps.expected: JSON output with routing_backend and routing_reason at top level
steps.observed: JSON with routing_backend="AstBackend", routing_reason="ast-native", version=1, total_edits=15000. Both routing fields present and non-empty.

steps.action: Create temp directory with test Python file containing two function definitions
steps.expected: Temp file created with def hello(x) and def goodbye(y)

steps.action: Run tg.exe run --rewrite "def replaced(z): return z" --apply --verify --json "def $F($$$): $$$" <temp-dir>
steps.expected: JSON output with routing_backend and routing_reason fields present and non-null
steps.observed: JSON with routing_backend="AstBackend", routing_reason="ast-native", version=1. Contains plan and verification sub-objects. verification.verified=2, verification.mismatches=[].

steps.action: Assert routing fields are present and non-null at top level
Verify file was actually modified by --apply
steps.observed: File now contains two "def replaced(z): return z" entries. Apply worked correctly.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. VAL-API-007 confirmed CPU search (matches=1/1) and AST search (matches=15000/15000) both include full match details in --json output. VAL-API-008 confirmed rewrite plan JSON includes routing_backend="AstBackend" and routing_reason="ast-native". VAL-API-009 confirmed apply+verify JSON includes routing fields at top level with non-null values, and verified file modifications were correctly applied.
